infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Kcal.AI needs camera access to scan your meals and estimate nutrition.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Kcal.AI needs photo library access to analyze food photos.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Kcal.AI uses your approximate location to suggest meals from your regional cuisine.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Kcal.AI to access your camera to scan meals.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Kcal.AI to access your photos to analyze food.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Kcal.AI uses your approximate location to suggest meals from your regional cuisine.
